title: Dashboard quick tunnel serves the dashboard shell and storyboard plugin
description: Verifies the worker quick tunnel is rooted at the dashboard app and that the storyboard plugin route renders inside the dashboard shell.
command:
set -euo pipefail
WORK_TARGET='{{workTarget}}'
GATEWAY_PORT='{{gatewayPort}}'
DASHBOARD_ROOT_PATH='{{dashboardRootPath}}'
PLUGIN_PATH='{{pluginPath}}'
URL="$(work-at "$WORK_TARGET" bash -lc "for f in /home/ec2-user/state/dashboard/cloudflared-dashboard-${GATEWAY_PORT}.log /home/ec2-user/state/dashboard/cloudflared-vite.dashboard-${GATEWAY_PORT}.log; do [ -f \"\$f\" ] || continue; grep -Eo 'https://[-a-z0-9]+\\.trycloudflare\\.com' \"\$f\"; done | tail -n 1")"
if [ -z "$URL" ]; then
  echo "missing quick tunnel URL for gateway port ${GATEWAY_PORT}" >&2
  exit 1
fi
ROOT_SNAPSHOT="$(work-at "$WORK_TARGET" bash -lc "agent-browser open '${URL}${DASHBOARD_ROOT_PATH}' >/dev/null && agent-browser wait 1000 >/dev/null && agent-browser snapshot -c")"
case "$ROOT_SNAPSHOT" in
  *'button "Storyboard"'* ) ;;
  * )
    echo "dashboard root is not rendering the dashboard shell on ${URL}${DASHBOARD_ROOT_PATH}" >&2
    exit 1
    ;;
esac
PLUGIN_SNAPSHOT="$(work-at "$WORK_TARGET" bash -lc "agent-browser open '${URL}${PLUGIN_PATH}' >/dev/null && agent-browser wait 1000 >/dev/null && agent-browser snapshot -c")"
case "$PLUGIN_SNAPSHOT" in
  *'button "Storyboard"'* ) ;;
  * )
    echo "plugin route is not rendering inside the dashboard shell on ${URL}${PLUGIN_PATH}" >&2
    exit 1
    ;;
esac
echo "${URL}${PLUGIN_PATH}"
